description_long: This street food stall features a rectangular wooden structure with a large, overhanging gabled roof in a muted gray color, providing ample shade and shelter. The front of the stall is equipped with a serving counter, a large spoked wheel on one side, and a pair of open cabinet doors beneath the counter, suggesting storage space. Above the counter, a row of blue-tinted panels displays black food-related symbols, serving as signage. A small bowl or dish is placed on the right side of the counter, and a box sits on the ground adjacent to the stall. The overall design is compact and functional, with a blend of traditional cart elements and modern signage.
description: A compact street food stall with a gabled roof, blue signage panels, a serving counter, and a large wheel, blending traditional and modern design elements.
description_view_0: Front view showing the serving counter, open cabinet doors, large wheel, signage panels, and a box on the ground.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the depth of the roof, the box at the base, and the closed rear of the stall.
description_view_2: Rear view showing the back of the stall, the wheel, the box, and a bowl on the counter.
description_view_3: Opposite side view focusing on the roof's overhang, the bowl on the counter, and the closed rear structure.
attribute_signage: A row of blue panels with black food-related symbols is placed above the serving counter, serving as signage. The style is simple and iconographic.
attribute_serving_counter: The serving counter is a flat, rectangular surface at the front of the stall, made of wood or similar material, with a bowl placed on one side and open cabinet doors below.
attribute_food_display: No explicit food display is visible; only a bowl is present on the counter, with no covered or open display cases.
attribute_architectural_style: traditional wooden cart with modern signage
